team.name: Jack Carlsen
team.desc: Hi — I'm Jack, writer-director and the reason there's a duck in the logo. I work across live-action and 2D / 3D animation, usually chasing whatever daydream refuses to leave me alone. I started Rare Pond on a simple itch: build worlds escapist enough to disappear into, but honest enough that you spot a little of your own life once you're inside. LMU Film & TV grad, based in Los Angeles, and pretty much always mid-project.

team.name: Karina Salerno
team.desc: Hey, I'm Karina — if it actually has to happen on set, odds are it runs through me. I handle logistics, jump in on producing, and lead production design, with plenty of hours logged in the camera, electrical, and sound departments when a shoot needs them. I love the puzzle of turning a big idea and a tight budget into a day that somehow stays on schedule — and a frame that looks like none of the chaos ever happened.
